title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
summary: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Another Ship Hit in Hormuz as Houthis Add to Regional Risks
summary: Another tanker was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz as renewed hostilities empty the waterway, while a threat by Houthi rebels to blockade Saudi Arabia in the Red Sea heightened regional maritime risks.

title: London Stock Exchange to Introduce Nonstop Trading Next Year
summary: The London Stock Exchange will open a new venue outside of its regular market hours in a move to offer “near-continuous trading” in the working week.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector’s banking challenges
summary: This comes weeks after the publication of the UK’s new crypto regulatory framework, set to take effect in October 2027.

title: Washington judge blocks Kalshi’s sports prediction markets over state gambling laws
summary: A Washington state court granted the state's motion for a preliminary injunction, saying Kalshi operates illegal gambling activities.

title: China weighs tighter export controls on AI models and chips
summary: Beijing consults companies on ways to stop west acquiring its advanced technologies and star start-ups

title: AI is becoming a geopolitical weapon, warns EU digital chief
summary: Europe needs to avoid relying on an unpredictable Washington for strategic capabilities, says Henna Virkkunen
